name: axtolab-ai-connector
description: Let AI agents safely write, edit, and manage your WordPress site. MCP Gateway for Claude, ChatGPT, and AI agents.

site_token_1.title: Site 1 — Connection Token
site_token_1.description: Generate in WordPress Admin → AI Connector → Generate Connection Token

site_token_2.title: Site 2 — Connection Token (optional)
site_token_2.description: Add a second WordPress site. Leave blank if not needed.

site_token_3.title: Site 3 — Connection Token (optional)
site_token_3.description: Add a third WordPress site. Leave blank if not needed.

site_token_4.title: Site 4 — Connection Token (optional)
site_token_4.description: Add a fourth WordPress site. Leave blank if not needed.

site_token_5.title: Site 5 — Connection Token (optional)
site_token_5.description: Add a fifth WordPress site. Leave blank if not needed. Need more than 5 sites? Create another extension profile or connect additional clients through the AI Connector setup screen.
